caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a black blazer over a light-colored button-down shirt, is seated at a table in front of a white backdrop. He is gesturing with his hands while speaking, his expression shifting from a serious look to a slight smile. On the table sits an open laptop with a blue cube logo on the back and a clear plastic water bottle. The backdrop features multiple repetitions of a blue cube logo along with the text "BigDataSV 2015" and "theCUBE." Overlaid text at the bottom of the scene reads "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" and "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room San Jose, CA," accompanied by a smaller "#BigDataSV 2015" logo. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, moving his hands and changing his facial expression as he talks.
